title: Classic Villages
description: This datapack aims to recreate the classic pre 1.14 Minecraft villages.
body:
![Classic Villages Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e6518ee7d94bb7b202f2de9d7a8815c987ee77c.png)

This datapack aims to recreate the classic pre 1.14 Minecraft villages.

---

The datapack comes in 4 different versions:
- **Classic Villages**: Restores villages to their classic, pre-update design.
- **Classic Villages (Gravel Paths)**: Same as Classic Villages but with gravel paths instead of the newer path blocks.
- **Classic Villages (Workstations)**: Classic villages with additional workstations and features like camels in desert villages and beds in houses.
- **Classic Villages (Workstations and Gravel Paths)**: Combines both gravel paths and the added workstations/features of the previous version.

---

Known Issues:
- **Zombie villages generate vanilla villages.**
- **All village houses are 1 block too far from the streets. (I didn't find a good way of fixing this)**
- **Houses will never spawn mirrored.**
